channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Remains of US soldier who went missing in Morocco have been recovered
item.description: The remains of a U.S. soldier who went missing during military drills in Morocco were recovered in the Atlantic Ocean, the army said. Military teams are searching for a second missing soldier.
item.content:encoded:
The remains of a U.S. soldier who went missing during military drills in Morocco were recovered in the Atlantic Ocean, the army said. Military teams are searching for a second missing soldier.

(Image credit: Mosa'ab Elshamy)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. cruise passengers fly back for hantavirus monitoring, as one tests positive
item.description: Passengers are returning to their home countries after weeks on the ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak. Most of the Americans aboard are headed for Nebraska to be evaluated by health officials.
item.content:encoded:
Passengers are returning to their home countries after weeks on the ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak. Most of the Americans aboard are headed for Nebraska to be evaluated by health officials.

(Image credit: Chris McGrath)
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang

item.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father
item.description: The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.
item.content:encoded:
The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.

(Image credit: Ilia Yefimovich)
item.dc:creator: Ruth Sherlock

item.title: Trump rejects Iran's latest response to U.S. ceasefire proposal
item.description: Iran delivered its response to Pakistani mediators on Sunday, according to the state-run Islamic Republic News Agency.
item.content:encoded:
Iran delivered its response to Pakistani mediators on Sunday, according to the state-run Islamic Republic News Agency.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: Why has China doubled its nuclear capacity in the last decade?
item.description: For decades, China pared back its nuclear weapons program and kept its arsenal to a minimum. Now, new satellite images show China is rapidly expanding its nuclear arsenal and production sites. Why?
item.content:encoded: For decades, China pared back its nuclear weapons program and kept its arsenal to a minimum. Now, new satellite images show China is rapidly expanding its nuclear arsenal and production sites. Why?
item.dc:creator: Emily Feng

item.title: Keir Starmer's party lost big in U.K. local elections. Here's what comes next
item.description: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.
item.content:encoded:
U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.

(Image credit: Hannah McKay/AP)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: Cape Verde: Tiny nation, massive World Cup dream
item.description: In Cape Verde, a small island nation off West Africa, World Cup qualification is transforming dreams on and off the pitch.
item.content:encoded:
In Cape Verde, a small island nation off West Africa, World Cup qualification is transforming dreams on and off the pitch.

(Image credit: Ricci Shryock for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Ricci Shryock

item.title: Iran ceasefire tested as cargo ship catches fire after being hit off Qatar's coast
item.description: A cargo ship caught fire Sunday after being hit by an unknown projectile off Qatar's coast, the British military said.
item.content:encoded: A cargo ship caught fire Sunday after being hit by an unknown projectile off Qatar's coast, the British military said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Protests and boycotts rock prestigious Venice Biennale
item.description: The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.
item.content:encoded:
The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.

(Image credit: Luca Bruno)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: Mideast war worsens conflict between elephants and villagers in Sri Lanka
item.description: Conflict between farmers and elephants in Sri Lanka has grown worse as food and fuel are scarcer due to war in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: Conflict between farmers and elephants in Sri Lanka has grown worse as food and fuel are scarcer due to war in the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Diaa Hadid
